body:
sapphic-dice:

goodtransgirl:

sapphic-dice:

I’ve made out with 3 women in the last week… shit I am a smidge of a slut…

No slut shaming allowed, those are the rules, so that means no shaming a lovely slut like yourself then, dear sister! 😘

Hey I love being a slut!

I didn’t say you were shaming yourself for being a slut, I said…

“…so that means no shaming a lovely slut like yourself then, dear sister!” 😘
